title: Notice to Traders 09/25 - Poultrymeat Import Quota
body: "You may submit your application for a licence between 1 February 2025 and 5pm on 7 February 2025.  It is your responsibility to check that the application and all additional documentation is correct at the time of submission.  Note: We will reject any applications, securities or proof of trade received after 5pm on 7 February 2025. "

taxons.title: Import, export and distribution of food
